landing.title: Hi, I'm
landing.name: Artur
landing.tagline: Full-stack developer building clean, purposeful software.
landing.description: I craft web applications with a focus on developer experience, performance, and thoughtful design.

about.title: About me
about.bio1: I'm a full-stack developer with a background in implementation engineering. I've worked closely with business teams and QA — analysing requirements, running performance tests, and delivering software that actually fits the problem.
about.bio2: These days I focus on full-stack development: building reliable backends in Java and clean interfaces in React. I care about understanding what I'm building before I write the first line.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Things I've built or am currently building.

desbytes.shortDesc: Personal portfolio and web platform. The project you're looking at right now.
desbytes.fullDesc: Desbytes is a full-stack personal portfolio built to showcase projects and serve as a learning ground for new technologies. The frontend is a React SPA served by Nginx on AWS EC2, sitting behind Cloudflare for caching and DDoS protection. The backend (Spring Boot) is planned for future features like a contact form API and dynamic project data.
highlights: Nginx configured for SPA routing, HTTP/2, gzip and asset caching
AWS EC2 + Cloudflare + Let's Encrypt SSL setup

learningshare.shortDesc: Web application for browsing and rating online courses.
learningshare.fullDesc: LearningShare is a full-stack web application built with Spring Boot and Thymeleaf. Users can browse courses by category, view course details with trailers and links, and rate them on a 1–5 scale. The application includes user registration, role-based access control (USER, EDITOR, ADMIN), and an admin panel for managing courses, categories, and image uploads.
highlights: Java 17 + Spring Boot 3 (Web MVC, Data JPA, Security)
Thymeleaf server-side templates with responsive UI
Role-based access control: USER, EDITOR, ADMIN
Admin panel — courses, categories, image upload
Dedicated demo Spring profile — secured for public access

project-alpha.shortDesc: Work in progress — details coming soon.
project-alpha.fullDesc: This project is currently in planning. More information will be added once development starts.

contact.intro: I'm open to freelance work, collaborations, and full-time opportunities. Drop me a message and I'll get back to you.
